dialog: Pssst... Neura... Look how good and high-performing I am.
Wow! Hey, why is your curve so... twisted?
I have memorized all the points. Every single point of the Training Set! My accuracy is at 100%. No mistakes.
100%? That sounds fantastic! I want to be perfect like you too!
Sure! It is an enormous power. Go back to training limitlessly and extract every tiny detail of those points. You will be infallible!
